utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six sections explicitly labeled. Each one is detailed: property includes description, price, and address (though address is 'not specified,' it is still mentioned); financing includes type, price, down payment, mortgage, interest rate, term, monthly payment, and fees; legal_services, moving_services, and setup_services each include description and cost; total_budget includes two cost breakdowns. Every requested item is covered and specified with appropriate details.
